condition.statement:
let user = "{{user}}"
let blueSnapVs = "{{BlueSnapVs}}"
blueSnapVs = blueSnapVs.split('.');
return user != "old"
        || 
        ((Number(blueSnapVs[0]) == 2 && Number(blueSnapVs[1]) == 5)
           &&  user == "old" )

let user = "{{user}}"

steps.value:
let logs = {{logs}}
return logs.response.response_data.headers[0] === "HTTP/1.1 201 Created" || logs.response.response_data.headers[0] === "HTTP/1.1 201 201"
